MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC's Motion To Correct Name Nunc Pro Tunc is Granted, no opposition was filed. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
